summary: SmartDine India testing iteration 2 - comprehensive testing of all 3 user roles, theme configuration, language switching, and payment demo mode. Backend: 100% pass (14/14 tests). Frontend: 90% functional with one minor issue.

integration_issues.issue: Language switcher dropdown may require page refresh or have timing issues - text didn't visually update in automated test though i18n is correctly configured

passed_tests: Theme endpoint returns custom restaurant branding (Nandhana Palace)
Menu endpoint returns 7 items with prices
Kitchen Staff login with 'Kitchen Staff/kitchen123' works
Kitchen dashboard displays three columns (New Orders, Preparing, Ready)
Manager dashboard shows stats cards (Total Orders, Paid Orders, Unpaid Orders, Total Revenue)
Manager dashboard has all four Quick Action buttons
Manager settings page has Basic Information and Theme & Branding tabs
Theme & Branding tab shows Logo, Background Image, and Color Scheme sections
Customer menu page displays menu items with Add to cart functionality
Cart page shows table number input, loyalty points, subtotal, and Place Order button
Loyalty points display working (40 points shown)
Language switcher component is visible at bottom-right
Payment demo mode backend flow works end-to-end (tested via pytest)
Role selection page displays with correct branding and three role cards
action_items: LOW: Investigate language switcher - may need page refresh after language change or i18n Suspense wrapper
critical_code_review_comments: Theme colors are correctly applied via useTheme() hook - no hardcoded orange/amber colors found
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Payment demo mode correctly handles placeholder Razorpay keys
i18n translations exist for all 6 languages (en, hi, kn, te, ta, ml)

mocked_api.note: Razorpay payment is MOCKED via demo mode in backend/routes/orders.js. When Razorpay keys are placeholder values, the backend returns demoMode: true and payment simulation works correctly.
mocked_api.result: Payment demo mode works end-to-end - order placed, kitchen marks ready, payment verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three user roles working. Customer registered with 1234567890/1234567890. Menu has 7 items. Kitchen dashboard shows orders. Manager can access settings and theme configuration. Payment demo mode fully functional. Language switcher present but may need manual verification that translations render correctly after switching.
